name: Coconut Cream Ice Cream
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat cream and coconut to boiling in a medium saucepan.
2. Simmer for 5 minutes.
3. Cool to room temperature.
4. Strain through cheesecloth lined with double thickness, pressing firmly to extract all cream.
5. Discard coconut; reserve cream mixture.
6. Heat milk and sugar just to simmering in a medium saucepan, stirring occasionally to dissolve sugar.
7. Whisk about 1/4 cup hot milk mixture into the egg yolk; whisk back into milk mixture.
8. Cook over medium heat for 2 minutes, whisking constantly.
9. Strain through fine strainer.
10. Stir reserved cream mixture into milk mixture; stir in coconut extract.
11. Cool to room temperature then chill.
12. Freeze.
